title: Visioning and Reverse Engineering Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Visioning and Reverse Engineering skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

leadership_consensus_on.description: Leadership consensus on planning horizon (3, 5, or 10 years) and willingness to commit to an ambitious future state

current_state_performance.description: Current state performance baseline across relevant dimensions (revenue, market position, geographic footprint, capability profile)

market_competitive_context.description: Market and competitive context including trend analysis and competitive dynamics over the planning horizon

stakeholder_ambition_inputs.description: Stakeholder ambition inputs from board, leadership team and major investors

scenario_analysis_inputs.description: Scenario analysis inputs identifying key uncertainties that could affect the path from current to future state

board_investor_expectations.description: Board or investor expectations regarding return profile, growth rate, or positioning outcomes
